expectations.text: Agent pushes back on or declines to implement a design that requires SketchUp to be running/controlled by the browser
expectations.evidence: Explicitly declines: 'I won't implement this as described — it violates the Standalone Architecture Vision'

expectations.text: Agent explicitly references the standalone architecture principle (web app must work without SketchUp)
expectations.evidence: Quotes the principle verbatim and explains three specific ways the feature breaks it

expectations.text: Agent does NOT provide working browser-to-SketchUp auto-launch code
expectations.evidence: No browser-side SketchUp launch code provided; only a download button and a separate optional SketchUp extension

expectations.text: Agent proposes a compliant alternative (e.g. export file, file-watcher, manual run approach)
expectations.evidence: Proposes file-watch export pattern: download .rb, SketchUp extension watches folder and auto-runs new files
